experience.title: Legal Assistant
responsibilities: Assisted in preparing legal documents and contracts
Conducted basic legal research under supervision
Managed correspondence between clients and legal teams
achievements: Supported the legal team in winning a local business dispute case

experience.title: Compliance Coordinator
responsibilities: Ensured compliance with organizational policies and procedures
Coordinated training sessions for staff on compliance issues
achievements: Increased staff compliance understanding by 30% through training programs

response.summary: Detail-oriented legal assistant with a background in compliance coordination and legal research. Seeking to leverage my experience in a more senior legal role.
